name: Performance - File Upload Large PDF
description: Tests the /summarize_file endpoint with a large but valid PDF file (close to 50,000 characters).
input: POST /summarize_file with a large .pdf UploadFile, summary_length, and user_email.
success_criteria: File extraction and summarization complete within 10 seconds (assuming LLM is stubbed/mocked)
error_scenarios: FileExtractionError if file is too large or corrupt
Timeout if processing is too slow
